## Summary

Brief description of the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither adds a feature nor fixes a bug
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] test — add or fix tests
- [ ] docs — documentation change
- [ ] chore — tooling, config, or other non-code change

## Scope

Packages affected (check all that apply):

- [ ] `@mnem/core`
- [ ] `@mnem/storage-local`
- [ ] `@mnem/storage-s3`
- [ ] `@mnem/index-sqlite`
- [ ] `@mnem/index-postgres`
- [ ] `@mnem/embeddings-openai`
- [ ] `@mnem/tools`
- [ ] `@mnem/cli`
- [ ] repo (CI / tooling / docs)

## Quality checklist

- [ ] `pnpm prettier` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (100% coverage on `@mnem/core`)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset if this PR should trigger a release (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Updated docs / README if the public surface changed

## Breaking change?

- [ ] Yes — describe migration path below
- [ ] No

## Additional notes

(Anything a reviewer should know.)
